summary: Email preferences feature testing completed. Backend: 29/29 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified and interactions working correctly. Reset, Save, and Toggle functionality confirmed.

minor.issue: Custom thresholds only apply when campaign has owner_id set. Test campaigns have null owner_id, so default thresholds (75, 90) are used.

critical_code_review_comments: Email preferences implementation is solid with proper validation
Budget thresholds correctly use custom values when campaign owner is set
Quiet hours logic properly handles overnight periods (e.g., 22:00 to 08:00)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email preferences feature fully implemented and tested. All 3 endpoints working: GET (returns prefs with defaults), PUT (updates with validation), POST reset (resets to defaults). Frontend Settings page at /settings shows all notification toggles, budget threshold sliders, weekly digest, and quiet hours options. State persists correctly after save.

elements: Digest Day selector (appears when Weekly Digest enabled)
Quiet Hours Period selectors (appear when Quiet Hours enabled)

budget_check_with_custom_thresholds.note: Budget check endpoint returns threshold values. Uses custom thresholds when campaign has owner_id set.
